description: Create test/Router.Invariant.t.sol with the accounting invariant from the spec's Non-Functional Requirements: `sumOfUserReceived + protocolFeesAccrued + partnerFeesPaid + positiveSlippageRetained == aggregateBalanceDiffOfExecutor`. Implements a handler contract that fuzzes calls to swap()/swapMulti() across a bounded set of tokens, bps values, and pass-through flags, while a ghost variable accumulator tracks the components. Runs under foundry.toml's invariant config (runs=256, depth=15).
steps: Create test/Router.Invariant.t.sol with setUp deploying Router, ExecutionProxy, and a RouterHandler at test/helpers/RouterHandler.sol.

Write test/helpers/RouterHandler.sol as a Foundry invariant handler exposing swapRandom(uint256 seed, uint256 inAmount, uint16 protoBps, uint16 partnerBps, bool onOutput, bool passThrough) and swapMultiRandom(...). Handler bounds bps to [0,200], picks inputToken/outputToken from a fixed set of 4 MockERC20 tokens + NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL, skips self-swap + duplicate cases, mints fresh balance for each call, pranks as one of 3 rotating users, then calls Router. On success, handler increments ghost variables: ghost_userReceived[outputToken] += amountToUser, ghost_protocolFees[inputToken] += computed protocol fee, ghost_partnerFees[token] += computed partner fee, ghost_positiveSlippage[outputToken] += computed retained surplus, and ghost_executorInflow[inputToken] += forwardAmount, ghost_executorOutflow[outputToken] += produced.

In the invariant test contract, declare target contracts via targetContract(handler) and implement function invariant_AccountingConservation() that iterates across the token set and asserts: `ghost_userReceived[token] + router.balanceOf(token) as protocol/slippage retention + ghost_partnerFees[token] == ghost_executorOutflow[token]` for each output; for each input, `ghost_executorInflow[token] + ghost_protocolFees[token] + ghost_inputPartnerFees[token] == sum(pulled over all calls)`. Document the exact equation in a comment referencing the spec.
Add invariant_NoResidualUserInput asserting router holds zero of the test users' original input tokens beyond what was intentionally retained (protocol fees + retained slippage tracked by ghosts).
Add invariant_NoDustLost asserting that for every successful call, the sum of Transfer events from the Router equals pulled - (stuff kept in router).
Run `forge test --match-path test/Router.Invariant.t.sol -vvv` and confirm all invariants hold across the default 256 runs / depth 15.
acceptance_criteria: [auto] `forge test --match-path test/Router.Invariant.t.sol` passes under foundry.toml's configured invariant runs/depth.
[auto] grep -n 'function invariant_AccountingConservation\|function invariant_NoResidualUserInput\|function invariant_NoDustLost' test/Router.Invariant.t.sol returns 3 matches.
[auto] grep -n 'targetContract\|targetSelector' test/Router.Invariant.t.sol returns at least one match wiring the handler.
[auto] grep -n 'bound(.*200)' test/helpers/RouterHandler.sol returns at least one match bounding bps parameters.

[manual] invariant_AccountingConservation asserts, for each token T in the fixed token set: ghost_userReceived[T] + ghost_protocolFees[T] + ghost_partnerFees[T] + ghost_positiveSlippage[T] == ghost_executorOutflow[T] + ghost_executorInflow[T] rearranged to match the spec's `sumUserReceived + protocolFeesAccrued + partnerFeesPaid + positiveSlippageRetained == aggregateBalanceDiffOfExecutor`, with a comment pointing at the spec's §Non-Functional Requirements invariant line.
[manual] Handler covers both swap() and swapMulti() paths and exercises the pass-through flag and partnerFeeOnOutput flag in different calls.
implementation_notes: Added test/helpers/RouterHandler.sol (invariant handler fuzzing swap()/swapMulti() across 4 ERC20s + NATIVE_ETH_SENTINEL, 3 rotating users, bps bounded [0,200], both partnerFeeOnOutput values and pass-through flag) and test/Router.Invariant.t.sol asserting three invariants: accounting conservation (two-role split that reconstructs spec's aggregate equation), no residual user input in Router beyond protocol fees + positive slippage, and no-dust-lost closure. All 3 invariants pass at 256 runs / depth 15 (3840 calls per invariant). Manual criterion [1]: invariant_AccountingConservation's NatSpec explicitly cites spec §Non-Functional Requirements and derives the aggregate from the two per-role equations. Manual criterion [2]: handler's swapRandom exercises swap() and swapMultiRandom exercises swapMulti(); seed bits toggle passPositiveSlippageToUser and partnerFeeOnOutput independently (ghost_passThroughUsed / ghost_partnerOnOutputUsed counters confirm coverage). Commit 12c09eb.
